title: Claustrophobia - NHS
text:
es, with most attacks lasting between 5 and 30 minutes.
Get more advice on coping with a panic attack 
Help and support Charities, such as  Anxiety UK and Anxiety Care UK , are useful sources of information and advice about how to effectively manage anxiety and phobias.
They can also put you in touch with other people who have had similar experiences.
Anxiety UK runs a helpline on 03444 775774 that's open Monday to Friday from 9.30am to 5.30pm. Calls are charged at the local rate.
You can contact Anxiety Care UK by email at support@anxietycare.org.uk  for advice and support.
